form.formComment: At the latest run rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 9 at Avoca 0 - 56 on March 29 over 1300m, 2 len behind Rubiquity with 59.5kg at $3.40. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 13 at Ararat 0 - 56 on February 8 over 1300m, 2 len behind Smart Return with 59.5kg at $2.80. Well drawn but this is a slight step up on recent assignments.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign by 1.5 len Seymour Mdn-Sw July 20 over 1600m slow track defeating Mislight carrying 57.5kg at $7. First up last campaign 11th of 13 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw April 27 over 1100m, soft track; 9 len behind Grand Intention with 57kg at $151.
